A2_1::KERNEL::KERNEL__IDENTITY_EMERGENCE.name: KERNEL__IDENTITY_EMERGENCE
A2_1::KERNEL::KERNEL__IDENTITY_EMERGENCE.description: ADMITTED: Identity is emergent, not primitive.

A2_1::KERNEL::KERNEL: Entropy-First Unif.name: KERNEL: Entropy-First Unified Framework
A2_1::KERNEL::KERNEL: Entropy-First Unif.description: Highest-confidence synthesis: Spacetime=entropy, one stuff, one force, recursive empirical validation. The axiomatic foundation of the entire system.

A2_1::KERNEL::KERNEL: Chiral Game Theory.name: KERNEL: Chiral Game Theory Operators
A2_1::KERNEL::KERNEL: Chiral Game Theory.description: Highest-confidence synthesis: 8-state → 16-state model with Te/Ti/Fe/Fi operators on S3+Hopf+Weyl. Mathematically locked and verified.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::holographic_entro.name: holographic_entropy_bound
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::holographic_entro.description: The universe as an expanding entangled field layering a massive, static probability space (white noise/fuzz). Time and information emerge from sequential correlations across this static field.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::retrocausal_multi.name: retrocausal_multiverse_genesis
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::retrocausal_multi.description: The present is caused by multiple converging possible futures. Infinite branches converge backward to create a single determined past and present.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::finite_universe_c.name: finite_universe_compressibility
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::finite_universe_c.description: Infinity is prohibited. Universes are treated as very large numbers bounded by Bekenstein limits. A random 'fuzz' universe is an incompressible number; evolving universes sit atop larger, unevolving numbers.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=9

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::converging_possib.name: converging_possibilities_gravity
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::converging_possib.description: Gravity is the pressure of all future spacetime possibilities converging on and pushing against the present. This geometry allows FTL-like effects (entanglement) without info transfer.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::dark_matter_as_co.name: dark_matter_as_condensed_entropy
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::dark_matter_as_co.description: If dark energy is expanding, positive entropy, then dark matter is contractive, negative entropy. Dark matter acts as 'sticky' micro gravitational waves forming the baseline foam from which 3D matter emerges.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::system_v4_rebuild.name: system_v4_rebuild_frame
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::system_v4_rebuild.description: The overarching project goal is rebuilding the upper system starting with A2 as the understanding and control layer, rather than managing old v3 lanes or prompting scaffolding.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::pure_nonclassical.name: pure_nonclassical_retooling
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::pure_nonclassical.description: All imported methods and structures must be stripped of classical semantics and re-expressed in pure nonclassical terms without exception.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::elimination_over_.name: elimination_over_truth
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::elimination_over_.description: Constraints act to eliminate, not to stamp 'Truth'. Survivors are pressure-shaped by attractor basins, similar to evolution, rejecting narrative collapse or single preferred truths.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::unitary_thread_b_.name: unitary_thread_b_ratchet
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::unitary_thread_b_.description: The singular execution loop combining B_Kernel and SIM constraints: Accept -> Park -> Reject -> Term Kill. This is the sole mechanism for converting proposed structure into verified canonical state.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::four_layer_trust_.name: four_layer_trust_architecture
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::four_layer_trust_.description: Strict separation of concerns: A2 (Understanding/Extraction), A1 (Proposal/Alignment), A0 (Constraint Packaging), and B (Proof/Execution). Context flows down, verified evidence flows up.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::evidence_ladder_s.name: evidence_ladder_sims
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::evidence_ladder_s.description: The 7-tier scale of pure Python, zero-dependency QIT matrix tests (T0_ATOM to T6_WHOLE_SYSTEM) providing executable evidence that structures behave coherently under nonclassical pressure.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_2::REFINED::THREAD_B_EXECUTION_LOOP::.name: THREAD_B_EXECUTION_LOOP
A2_2::REFINED::THREAD_B_EXECUTION_LOOP::.description: The singular ratchet mechanism: B_Kernel + SIM constraints enforce Accept→Park→Reject→Kill on proposed terms. This is the only path from PROPOSAL_ONLY to CANONICAL_ALLOWED. Both structural and evidence ladders must advance together.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::b_kernel_7_stage_.name: b_kernel_7_stage_pipeline
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::b_kernel_7_stage_.description: Fixed deterministic stage order: AUDIT_PROVENANCE → DERIVED_ONLY_GUARD → CONTENT_DIGIT_GUARD → UNDEFINED_TERM_FENCE → SCHEMA_CHECK → DEPENDENCY_GRAPH → NEAR_DUPLICATE → PRESSURE → EVIDENCE_UPDATE → COMMIT. No reordering permitted.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::graveyard_write_c.name: graveyard_write_contract
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::graveyard_write_c.description: Every rejection must include candidate_id, reason_tag, raw_lines, failure_class (B_KILL or SIM_KILL), target_ref. Meaningful survivors must link to negative_sim_ids and alternative_graveyard_ids. No-raw-line rejects and untied junk alternatives are forbidden.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a0_deterministic_.name: a0_deterministic_canonicalization
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a0_deterministic_.description: A0 is the deterministic bridge from A1 strategy to B artifacts. Canonicalization pipeline: parse → drop forbidden fields (confidence, probability, embedding) → normalize types → sort keys → serialize canonical JSON → hash. A0 never declares canon truth.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a0_export_block_c.name: a0_export_block_compilation
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a0_export_block_c.description: A0 compiles A1_STRATEGY_v1 items into EXPORT_BLOCK vN containers using bootpack grammar (AXIOM_HYP, PROBE_HYP, SPEC_HYP). Deterministic bucket ordering: anchor prereqs → primary targets → alternatives → pressure/probe → sim/evidence. No free English in B-scanned fields.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a0_budget_and_tru.name: a0_budget_and_truncation
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a0_budget_and_tru.description: Budget enforcement via max_items, max_sims, max_wall_ms. Deterministic truncation on overflow: drop lowest-priority bucket first, then reverse lexical, then highest dependency depth, then latest branch id. Dropped items go to carryover queue with BUDGET_TRUNCATED.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_rosetta_functi.name: a1_rosetta_function
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_rosetta_functi.description: A1 is the Rosetta layer between high-entropy source language (A2/human) and canon-safe B grammar. Two-phase: (1) Cold-core extraction strips to explicit math objects/relations, rewrites as kernel-safe candidates, forces hidden assumptions into named deps, generates designed-to-fail alternatives. (2) Reattachment dictionaries map multiple external dialects onto surviving kernel objects as annotation-only overlays.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_strategy_v1_sc.name: a1_strategy_v1_schema
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_strategy_v1_sc.description: Mandatory output format: A1_STRATEGY_v1 with schema, strategy_id, inputs (state_hash, fuel_slice_hashes, bootpack_rules_hash), budget, policy (forbid_fields, overlay_ban_terms, require_try_to_fail), targets[], alternatives[], sims{positive,negative}, self_audit. Hard bans: no confidence/probability fields, no raw prose to B.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_anti_classical.name: a1_anti_classical_leakage
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_anti_classical.description: RQ-097: treat any 'classical proof thinking' that bypasses ratcheting as drift and correct via explicit proposal repair. RQ-098: default stance is non-conservative batching; convergence via massive exploration under finitude and noncommutation.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::sim_7_tier_archit.name: sim_7_tier_architecture
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::sim_7_tier_archit.description: Evidence tiers: T0_ATOM → T1_COMPOUND → T2_OPERATOR → T3_STRUCTURE → T4_SYSTEM_SEGMENT → T5_ENGINE → T6_WHOLE_SYSTEM. Explicit acyclic dependencies. No tier-skip promotion.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::negative_sim_defi.name: negative_sim_definition
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::negative_sim_defi.description: Negative sim is a falsification test (not a generic failure artifact) with required fields: target_id, failure_mode_id, expected_outcome_class (NEG_EXPECT_FAIL_TARGET or NEG_EXPECT_REJECT_ALTERNATIVE). Static admission is insufficient — meaningful survivor status requires positive evidence + negative evidence + plausible failed alternatives.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_controller_dis.name: a2_controller_dispatch_first
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_controller_dis.description: RQ-147: A2_CONTROLLER is dispatch/routing first. If substantive processing can be expressed as a bounded worker packet, controller must dispatch rather than absorb. Direct controller work is limited to: weighted state refresh, queue/readiness eval, one bounded audit pass, launch/dispatch/closeout routing.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_low_entropy_bo.name: a2_low_entropy_boot_order
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_low_entropy_bo.description: A2 kernel formation begins from lowest-entropy system-law surfaces, then expands: A2_OPERATIONS_SPEC → ZIP_PROTOCOL → ZIP_SAVE_SPEC → SURFACE_CLASS_RULES → BRAIN_SLICE → SYSTEM_UNDERSTANDING → TERM_CONFLICT_MAP → DISTILLATION_INPUTS → INTENT_SUMMARY → MODEL_CONTEXT → OPEN_UNRESOLVED. Do not begin from high-entropy thread material or interpretive overlay.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_append_first_s.name: a2_append_first_safety
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_append_first_s.description: Default posture: classify before mutating, append before rewriting, demote before deleting. No rewriting active control docs for a cleaner story. No replacing older user corrections. No deleting system surfaces as ordinary cleanup. Leaner appearance is not evidence of improvement.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::end_to_end_9_step.name: end_to_end_9_step_loop
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::end_to_end_9_step.description: Fixed pipeline: A2 prepares fuel → A1 generates strategy → A0 canonicalizes/compiles → B adjudicates → A0 loads snapshot → A0 dispatches SIM queue → SIM runs evidence → B ingests evidence → A1/A2 consume feedback. State objects: canonical state (B-owned), parked set, graveyard, term registry, pending evidence map, sim manifest store, strategy hash index.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::stall_and_progres.name: stall_and_progress_surfaces
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::stall_and_progres.description: Stall signals: repeated same-tag rejection, pending-evidence accumulation without closure, park-set growth without dep resolution, branch diversity collapse. Progress signals: growth of evidence-backed survivors, closure of stress-family coverage, tier promotion progress, structured graveyard expansion tied to real targets.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::eleven_conformanc.name: eleven_conformance_gates
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::eleven_conformanc.description: 11 gates that must all pass before promotion: Gate 0 Authority Coverage, Gate 1 Ownership Integrity, Gate 2 Unknown Handling (mark UNKNOWN, no promotion of unverified inference), Gate 3 Root Constraint Protection (no weakening RQ-001/RQ-002), Gate 4 Anti-Paperclip (no fake evidence, no graveyard padding, no admission-count optimization), Gate 5 Pre-Run Conformance, Gate 6 Owner/Orphan Lint, Gate 7 Normative Drift Hash, Gate 8 Promotion Audit Package, Gate 9 Controlled Tuning, Gate 10 Fixture Matrix Lock.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::zip_job_determini.name: zip_job_deterministic_carrier
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::zip_job_determini.description: ZIP_JOB is the atomic deterministic inter-thread carrier. Self-describing via ZIP_JOB_MANIFEST_v1.json. Validates deterministically before use. B does not ingest ZIPs directly — only its three accepted containers pass through.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::save_levels_min_f.name: save_levels_min_full_fullpp
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::save_levels_min_f.description: Three explicit save levels: MIN (fast rebootable checkpoint), FULL+ (canon restore carrier, sufficient to restore B and proceed without Rosetta), FULL++ (FULL+ plus campaign tape plus optional overlays, never required by B).

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::campaign_tape_app.name: campaign_tape_append_only
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::campaign_tape_app.description: CAMPAIGN_TAPE v1 is mandatory and append-only. Records (EXPORT_BLOCK + THREAD_B_REPORT) pairs in canonical order via deterministic JSONL. EXPORT_TAPE v1 is the pre-run ordered list that promotes into CAMPAIGN_TAPE by appending B reports.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::b_canon_state_obj.name: b_canon_state_objects
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::b_canon_state_obj.description: B maintains exactly these replayable state objects: SURVIVOR_LEDGER (Map ID→{CLASS,STATUS,ITEM_TEXT,PROVENANCE}), PARK_SET, REJECT_LOG, KILL_LOG, TERM_REGISTRY (Map TERM_LITERAL→{STATE,BOUND_MATH_DEF,REQUIRED_EVIDENCE,PROVENANCE} where STATE∈{QUARANTINED,MATH_DEFINED,TERM_PERMITTED,LABEL_PERMITTED,CANONICAL_ALLOWED}), EVIDENCE_PENDING.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::derived_only_guar.name: derived_only_guard
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::derived_only_guar.description: Large set of terms (equal, identity, coordinate, metric, time, cause, optimize, probability, etc.) are derived-only primitives: not forbidden, but forbidden as primitive use until CANONICAL_ALLOWED via the full term pipeline. Prevents classical language from entering the system unchecked.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::kernel_seed_state.name: kernel_seed_state
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::kernel_seed_state.description: Initial B state: SURVIVOR_LEDGER seeded with exactly F01_FINITUDE and N01_NONCOMMUTATION. PARK_SET empty. TERM_REGISTRY empty. Everything else must be ratcheted in from scratch.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::kill_if_semantics.name: kill_if_semantics
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::kill_if_semantics.description: KILL_IF is declarative and idempotent. An item is KILLED iff: (1) item declares KILL_IF <ID> CORR <COND_TOKEN>, (2) SIM_EVIDENCE contains matching KILL_SIGNAL, and (3) kill binding passes (default local: SIM_ID must equal target ID; remote kill requires explicit KILL_BIND DEF_FIELD).

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::known_internal_in.name: known_internal_inconsistencies
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::known_internal_in.description: Two recorded inconsistencies in the bootpack: (1) TERM_DRIFT appears as a rejection tag but is not in the BR-000A TAG_FENCE, (2) MEGABOOT_SHA256 header is required by MBH-002 when active but not listed in EXPORT_BLOCK container grammar. These are preserved, not smoothed.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_2::REFINED::TERM_RATCHET_THROUGH_EVID.name: TERM_RATCHET_THROUGH_EVIDENCE
A2_2::REFINED::TERM_RATCHET_THROUGH_EVID.description: Terms must traverse MATH_DEF→TERM_DEF→LABEL_DEF→CANON_PERMIT, with derived-only guard preventing classical language from entering unchecked. CANONICAL_ALLOWED status requires SIM evidence. Combined with 7-tier SIM architecture (T0-T6) and 5 stress families, this creates the complete evidence ladder.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=9

A2_2::REFINED::A2_TO_B_DETERMINISTIC_BRI.name: A2_TO_B_DETERMINISTIC_BRIDGE
A2_2::REFINED::A2_TO_B_DETERMINISTIC_BRI.description: A2 (nondeterministic mining/understanding) → A1 (nondeterministic Rosetta translation with designed-to-fail alternatives) → A0 (deterministic canonicalization stripping forbidden fields) → B (deterministic admission). Only A0 output touches B. ZIP_JOB carriers move artifacts between layers deterministically.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=9

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_branch_explora.name: a1_branch_exploration_contract
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_branch_explora.description: A1 branch exploration uses a fixed operator-quota table summing to exactly 1.0. Each branch stores immutable lineage (branch_id, parent, seed_hash, prompt_hash, operator_history, feedback_refs). Branches are ranked by viability then novelty with deterministic tie-breaking. Every target cluster must emit at least one TRY_TO_FAIL alternative.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::compile_ready_can.name: compile_ready_candidate_object
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::compile_ready_can.description: Every A1 kernel-lane candidate must be a structured object with item_class, id, kind, requires[], def_fields[] (field_id, name, value_kind∈{BARE,TERM_QUOTED,LABEL_QUOTED,FORMULA_QUOTED}, value), asserts[]. Token-safe only — no free English in compile lanes.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_canonical_sche.name: a2_canonical_schemas
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_canonical_sche.description: Detailed schemas for all canonical A2 files: memory.jsonl (A2_MEMORY_ENTRY_v1 with entry_id, ts_utc, entry_type, content, source_refs, tags), doc_index.json (A2_DOC_INDEX_v1), fuel_queue.json (A2_FUEL_QUEUE_v1 with provenance + validity state), rosetta.json (A2_ROSETTA_OVERLAY_v1 with mapping states PROPOSED/ACTIVE/DEPRECATED).

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_deterministic_.name: a2_deterministic_tick_sequence
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_deterministic_.description: Ordered refresh sequence per A2 tick: refresh doc_index → append memory entries → refresh fuel_queue → refresh rosetta → refresh derived summaries (if compaction trigger) → append SEAL_RECORD (if seal trigger). No reorder allowed within one tick.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::tuning_classifica.name: tuning_classification_gates
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::tuning_classifica.description: Three tuning classes: SAFE_PARAM (auto-apply after replay), RULE_INTERPRETATION (explicit review required), SEMANTIC_CHANGE (explicit review + fixture matrix lock). Every proposal must declare objective metric, stop condition, rollback target, and mutation budget before execution.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::deterministic_dua.name: deterministic_dual_replay
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::deterministic_dua.description: RQ-124: promotion candidate must produce identical final state hash AND identical event-log hash across two full deterministic replays from same baseline. Mismatch → mark NONDETERMINISTIC, write graveyard record, block promotion. No silent rule changes, no undocumented fallback logic.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::p0_through_p7_bui.name: p0_through_p7_build_phases
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::p0_through_p7_bui.description: Fixed 8 implementation phases: P0_SPEC_LOCK → P1_ARTIFACT_GRAMMAR → P2_B_CONFORMANCE → P3_A0_COMPILER → P4_A1_TO_B_SMOKE (50-cycle deterministic replay) → P5_SIM_EVIDENCE_LOOP → P6_LONG_RUN_DISCIPLINE → P7_RELEASE_CANDIDATE (dual replay hash match). Skipping a phase is forbidden.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_entropy_reduct.name: a2_entropy_reduction_mission
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_entropy_reduct.description: A2 exists to reduce document entropy without destroying intent. Primary objective is structured over-capture, not aggressive compression. A2 output is fuel for A1 and later ratchet work, not canon. A2 is also the controlling upstream surface for bounded work sequencing.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_seven_hard_rul.name: a2_seven_hard_rules
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_seven_hard_rul.description: 7 inviolable A2 rules: (1) no narrative smoothing — contradictions are preserved, (2) no implicit ontology admission, (3) no implicit time semantics, (4) no implicit commutative defaults, (5) no teleology unless marked as hypothesis, (6) every claim needs source locator or UNVERIFIED, (7) incomplete extraction fails closed with gap report.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::fourteen_active_t.name: fourteen_active_term_conflicts
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::fourteen_active_t.description: 14 known semantic conflicts with working rules: (1) 'canon' used too broadly, (2) AXIOM_HYP vs root constraint, (3) entropy vs classical thermodynamic language, (4) Axis 4 vs 5 (localization vs excitation), (5) 'canonical_term' in proposals sounds truth-stamping, (6) A2 environment boundary stronger in branch docs, (7) family/path unit not centrally described, (8) overlay/kernel/fuel/history boundary blurred, (9) lean packet vs mass-lane tension, (10) axes as ratchetable objects vs manifold DOF, (11) helper term bootstrap leakage, (13) thread weighting by authority not recency, (14) constraint manifold authority status.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::user_corrections_.name: user_corrections_outrank_synthesis
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::user_corrections_.description: User corrections outrank assistant synthesis. Reason for a user input outranks its surface wording. Older user inputs are not automatically weaker. Newer assistant outputs are not automatically stronger. Contradictions must be preserved rather than flattened into a latest-summary voice.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::coupled_structura.name: coupled_structural_evidence_ladders
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::coupled_structura.description: The active machine is one ratchet with two coupled ladders: structural (A2→A1→A0→B) and evidence (SIM tier progression T0-T6). Do not confuse admissibility with evidence. Do not treat SIM as optional after B. Keep candidate families tied to both obligations.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=7

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::ten_negative_clas.name: ten_negative_classes
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::ten_negative_clas.description: 10 mandatory negative classes: PRIMITIVE_EQUALS, CLASSICAL_TIME, PRIMITIVE_PROBABILITY, EUCLIDEAN_METRIC, COMMUTATIVE_ASSUMPTION, CONTINUOUS_BATH, INFINITE_SET, CLASSICAL_TEMPERATURE, NARRATIVE_SMOOTHING, KERNEL_VALID_BUT_MODEL_EMPTY. These shape A1 graveyard pressure.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

Uppercase snake tokens. Allowed charset: A-Za-z0-9_. No spaces/hyphens/parens. Filename max 160 chars (prefer 120). 8 ARTIFACT_ROLE values: INPUT_JOB, OUTPUT_JOB, BRAIN_UPDATE_PACKET, BOOTPACK, AUDIT, MANIFEST, REQUEST, RETURN.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_to_a1_handoff_.name: a2_to_a1_handoff_contract
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_to_a1_handoff_.description: A2 prepares/distills/routes/dispatches. A1 proposes from bounded fuel, does not self-start from raw source. Minimum handoff packet: dispatch_id, handoff_status, target_a1_role, required_a1_boot, source_a2_artifacts, bounded_scope, required_output_shape, stop_rule. Valid target_a1_role: A1_ROSETTA, A1_PROPOSAL, A1_PACKAGING (not A1_REFINERY or A1_DO_WORK). A1 may start only under READY_FROM_NEW_A2_HANDOFF/READY_FROM_EXISTING_FUEL/READY_FROM_A2_PREBUILT_BATCH.

Layered A1 read: A1-2 (rosetta/translation) and A1-1 (cartridge/proposal kernel).

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_queue_status_s.name: a1_queue_status_surface

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::parallel_codex_th.name: parallel_codex_thread_control_law
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::parallel_codex_th.description: 6 hard rules: ONE_CONTROLLER_ONLY, WORKER_SLOTS_ONLY, NON_OVERLAP_REQUIRED, A1_IS_SEPARATE, THREADS_ARE_BOOTED, ONE_BOUNDED_PASS_PER_THREAD. Slot layout: C0 (1 A2_CONTROLLER), W1 (0-1 A2_WORKER), W2 (0-1 non-overlapping A2_WORKER), A1 (0-1 dispatch-governed A1_WORKER). Hard ceiling: 4 live Codex threads. Launch order: controller first, W1, then W2 only if separate, A1 last only if ready. Required per-thread metadata: THREAD_CLASS, BOOT_SURFACE, BOUNDED_SCOPE, EXPECTED_OUTPUTS, STOP_RULE, CLOSEOUT_ROUTE.

Every thread-class and ZIP-subagent lane must have explicit boot binding. ZIP files must carry boot reference in 00_RUN_ME_FIRST, meta/README.md, or meta/ZIP_JOB_MANIFEST_v1.json. Minimum future ZIP fields: ROLE, BOOT_SURFACE, ALLOWED_ACTIONS, BLOCKED_ACTIONS, REQUIRED_OUTPUTS, STOP_RULE.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_vs_a1_role_spl.description: Explicit role fence: A2 owns refinery (broad reading, mass distillation, source-to-residue reduction, family triage, batch shaping). A1 owns only bounded proposal-side work (A1_ROSETTA = stripping/translation, A1_PROPOSAL = branch families+negatives+rescues, A1_PACKAGING = structuring for downstream). Do not call it A1 refinery. Role stack: A2 refines/dispatches -> A1 proposes -> lower loop evaluates/constrains.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::auto_go_on_rule::.name: auto_go_on_rule
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::auto_go_on_rule::.description: Auto go-on allowed only when: thread completed one bounded pass AND emitted explicit bounded continuation contract (NEXT_STEP, IF_ONE_MORE_PASS, ROLE_AND_SCOPE, WHAT_YOU_READ, WHAT_YOU_UPDATED). Hard ceiling: max 1 automatic go-on in a row. Never chains freely. Allowed for A2_WORKER and A1_WORKER. Blocked for A2_CONTROLLER by default. 9 blocked conditions including recap/polish, role drift, scope broadening, hidden-memory dependence.

Replay integrity: strictly monotone sequence per (run_id,source_layer), PARK on gap. A0-DET-01: identical inputs -> identical outputs. 10 reject tags.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::axes_master_spec_.name: axes_master_spec_canon
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::axes_master_spec_.description: CANON axis semantics. Global locks: Geometry is constraint manifold before axes 0-6. Axes are functions/slices Ai:M->Vi, not primitives. Axis-0 = two-class partition from probes. Axis-6 = precedence/composition sidedness. Axis-5 = generator regime split. Axis-3 = ONLY engine-family split (Type-1/Type-2). Axis-4 = variance-order math class (DEDUCTIVE/INDUCTIVE). Axis-1×Axis-2 = Topology4 (four base regimes). Guardrails: Axis-4≠Axis-6, base regimes≠edges. Build order: 0->6->5->3->4->(1×2).

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::canon_geometry_co.name: canon_geometry_constraint_manifold
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::canon_geometry_co.description: CANON geometry spec. Core objects: Constraint set C, Constraint manifold M(C) = space of admissible configurations, Geometry = coordinate-free structure on M(C) induced by C. Axes as slices: Ai:M(C)->Vi for i=0..6. Axis-3: A3:M(C)->{Type-1,Type-2} selecting engine-family template. Engine families = equivalence classes of engine templates. Compliance: no axis as primitive substrate, no axis before manifold, no Axis-3 bound to chirality/handedness/spinor/Berry/flux in CANON.

Derived geometry: Bloch sphere S2, S3, Hopf fibration, Weyl spinors. Gravity-as-gradient candidates (killable). Quarantined: teleology, anthropic framing, deity framing, cosmological storytelling. Useful core: treat selection as constraint satisfaction under ensemble, retrocausality as path-integral weighting. Action order: operator-only formalisms -> geometry as derived -> gravity model candidates tested via sims.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::entropic_monism_a.name: entropic_monism_and_allowable_math_charter
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::entropic_monism_a.description: FOUNDATIONAL 1424-line document. Entropic monism: one primitive substance = constraint on distinguishability. Identity principle: a=a iff a~b under all admissible probes. Illegal math: completed infinities, unrestricted reals, global coordinates, absolute metrics, free equality, axiomatic objects. Allowed math: non-commutative algebra (operator algebras, path-dependent composition), order theory (partial orders, refinement lattices, Galois connections), information geometry (late, derived), category-like structures (morphisms before objects). Allowable Mathematics Charter: C1 Finitude, C2 Non-commutation, C3 Emergent identity -> forced math types. Everything else (axes, engines, physics, cognition) is downstream.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::four_forced_const.name: four_forced_constructions_from_constraints
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::four_forced_const.description: 1475-line document with 4 constraint-compatible constructions. Construction 1: finite non-commutative refinement category (equivalence classes under probes, refinement preorder, path-dependent). Construction 2: entropy as refinement-path functional S(gamma)=sum log mu([xk]), state entropy S([x])=sup path entropy, negative entropy from constraint accumulation, i-scalar as global ordering. Construction 3: path cost C(gamma)=sum|delta_S|, admissible paths C<=kappa, survivorship without probability, cycles as proto-engines. Construction 4: irreducible distinctions as rewrite-closed partitions of admissible constructions -> birth of axes.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::constraint_manifo.name: constraint_manifold_formal_derivation
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::constraint_manifo.description: 20 formal derivation rules CMD01-CMD20. CMD02 global carrier as finite token registry M. CMD03 state indexing Ind(s,m). CMD04 no canonical distinguished points. CMD05 compatibility from transport CompM(m,n). CMD06 no total compatibility. CMD07 no connectedness assumption. CMD08 obstruction lifting. CMD09 obstruction-induced nontriviality. CMD10-11 path tokens with transport support. CMD12 path concatenation (no associativity/identity assumed). CMD13 nonflattenability from witnessed obstruction. CMD14 no universal trivialization. CMD15-17 forbidden: metric, coordinate, dimension assertions. CMD18-20 open: geometry, curvature, dimensionality as extensions.

properties.promoted_reason: PROMOTION_AUDIT: all gates pass, authority=CANON, score=5

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::engine_contract_e.name: engine_contract_e1_to_e8
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::engine_contract_e.description: Engine admissibility contract with 24 rules in 8 groups. E1 (cycle admission): no primitive cycles, domain-scoped, no uniqueness assumption. E2 (cycle comparison): no equivalence by default, no collapse by relabeling, value ≠ equivalence. E3 (cycle composition): no closure-by-default, no associativity-by-default, no unbounded repetition. E4 (stability): no stability-by-default, stability ≠ admissibility, multiple stability predicates may coexist. E5 (engine admission): requires explicit obstruction witness + comparison criterion, nontrivial obstruction, engine equivalence must account for obstruction. E6 (engine classes): multiple classes may coexist, no global ranking, no engines-from-cycles-alone. E7 (scalar functionals): no default accumulation, no scalar-driven canonicalization, no invariance-by-default. E8 (boundaries): no hidden structure, no canonical normal forms, no semantic completion.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a2_low_entropy_li.description: Low entropy library v4: 15 entries tracking canon-installed structures. ENTRY 1-2: finitude + non-commutation as root constraints. ENTRY 3: probe infrastructure exists. ENTRY 4-5: equality/digit signs not canonically allowed. ENTRY 6-7: no PARK_SET or EVIDENCE_PENDING. ENTRY 8: non-commutation scope precision. ENTRY 9: canon does NOT ratchet algebra/topology/axes/engines/gradients yet. ENTRIES 10-15: ordered composition required, equivalence cannot be primitive identity, states must be finite-representable, distinguishability operational via probes, equivalence = indistinguishability under all probes, state updates preserve finite representability.
